output.sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?competitionLabel WHERE {
  ?result wdt:P588 ?score ; wdt:P162 ?competition ; wdt:P644 wd:Q1658744 ; wdt:P644 wd:Q107383 .
  FILTER(xsd:decimal(?score) = 215.2)
  ?competition rdfs:label ?competitionLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?competitionLabel) = "en")
}
